title: Why OpenUSD's 'real threat' that tanked Circle stock still faces a steep uphill battle for adoption
summary: The Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium can challenge Circle's business model, but analysts say building a network is harder than assembling big-name partners.

title: SEC giving novel ETFs a rethink as it opens comment period on overhauling U.S. rules
summary: Managers of exchange-traded funds, including those in the crypto sector, may see some changes at the Securities and Exchange Commission as it weighs its approach.

title: Chinese exile once linked to Trump strategist gets 30-year sentence in $1 billion fraud
summary: The businessman known as Miles Guo, who pushed the fraudulent H-Coin project and had close ties to Steve Bannon, was finally sentenced after his 2024 conviction.

title: Jefferies warns of crypto market volatility as Clarity Act faces Senate test
summary: The bank said the bill faces major hurdles, with passage boosting institutional crypto adoption and delays prolonging regulatory uncertainty.

title: Circle slides 13% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back rival stablecoin network
summary: Open Standard's Open USD aims to let partners keep reserve income and eliminate minting fees, challenging Circle's USDC.
